# DiceLand Vendor

Source: https://github.com/PEPEANT/diceland

Commit: `b8cec6b9a231a04b230b338dddb86c839f613f90`

Vendored scope for reference:

- `index.html`
- `src/main.js`
- `src/core/input.js`
- `src/features/blackjack/blackjackUI.js`
- `src/features/blackjack/blackjackLogic.js`
- `src/features/roulette/rouletteUI.js`
- `src/features/roulette/rouletteLogic.js`
- `styles/hud.css`
- `styles/scenes/blackjack.css`
- `styles/scenes/roulette.css`

Rule: keep these files byte-for-byte identical to the source commit. Baegeum City v2 should reference the DiceLand mobile controls, chip HUD, blackjack, roulette, and ranking patterns before adapting any gambling UI into `src/`.
